goals.title: Explain the /Users/cosmos/dev/ontology/trustgraph repository in detai...
goals.objective: Explain the /Users/cosmos/dev/ontology/trustgraph repository in detail in Korean, grounded in live inspection. Research-shaped deliverable. Success criteria: C1 map documented purpose, package structure, runtime surfaces, and core architecture from README/pyproject/source evidence; C2 verify non-mutating project surfaces via available CLI/build/test metadata and report limits/caveats. Tier LIGHT because no code change or external-state mutation is requested, but evidence is required due to ulw.

successCriteria.scenario: Auxiliary research surface: inspect README.md, pyproject files, package directories, and representative source modules; PASS when the final Korean explanation maps purpose, packages, architecture, and data flow with concrete file/command evidence.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: CLI stdout from rg/find/sed/nl inspections plus final answer citations to local files.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: README.md lines 18-24, 71-90; pyproject package metadata; core source inspections of AsyncProcessor, FlowProcessor, gateway, RAG, storage adapters; final answer cites local file links. cleanup: no processes, ports, tmux, browser, or temp dirs created.

successCriteria.scenario: Auxiliary verification surface: inspect build/test metadata and run non-mutating available commands such as package metadata parsing or pytest collection/help checks; PASS when final answer reports what was verified and any limits.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: CLI stdout from Makefile/requirements/pyproject inspection and at least one non-mutating validation command.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: CI workflow inspected; run_tests.sh inspected; pytest collect attempted and failed because local python has no pytest; AST parse checked 667 Python files and found one bash script stored as .py; import checker showed packages not installed in this env. cleanup: no processes, ports, tmux, browser, or temp dirs created.

successCriteria.scenario: Auxiliary regression surface: inspect git status after read-only analysis; PASS when no unintended source changes exist except ULW evidence artifacts if generated.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: git status --short --untracked-files=all shows only .omo/ulw-loop evidence artifacts created for this run; no source files changed. cleanup: no generated caches found, no runtime state left.

goals.evidence: Repository explanation research complete; all success criteria have recorded evidence and final answer will report validation caveats.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/019f124c-74e3-76c1-9a67-4c65799f2cd3/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/019f124c-74e3-76c1-9a67-4c65799f2cd3/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
